name: Morning Brief
summary: A scheduled, voice-read brief of your day + what's coming, synthesized from your calendar, inbox, calls, tasks and Slack.
description: Every morning, ~an hour before you start (configurable), this assembles a CITED slice of your real data from the sources you pick -- calendar, gmail, tasks, granola calls, slack (an extensible set; more as extensions are added) -- and has Claude (on your subscription, no metered key) write 2-3 spoken paragraphs: the shape of today, what's coming over the next week or two, and any prep/watch-outs. It can read the brief aloud in a natural voice (ElevenLabs or OpenAI, vault key) and auto-play it in the Brief lens as you sit down. Per project: each console briefs its own day. Everything is configurable in the Brief lens -- start time, lead time, horizon, which sources feed it, voice, and tone.

requires.label: OPTIONAL -- an ElevenLabs API key for the most natural voice (elevenlabs.io -> Profile -> API key). If unset, the brief uses OpenAI TTS (OPENAI_API_KEY in the vault) and falls back to the built-in macOS voice. Voice can also be turned off entirely.

routine.name: Morning Brief
routine.desc: Assemble + synthesize + voice the daily brief, ~1h before start time (configurable in the Brief lens).
